---
title: "Rabbit_lowres_ScenarioA_Plotting"
author: "Nikolai Vukov"
date: "2026-06-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Libraries needed

```{r,message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}}
if(!requireNamespace("knitr", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages ("knitr")

library(knitr)
```

# Pre-Plotting Process

```{r,include=FALSE}

print("Running the Script")
#Runs the script to read and retrieve the needed datasets
ScriptSource<-source("Lowres_ReadingData_Script.R")
opts_knit$set(root.dir=ScriptSource)

#Getting system date 
date<- format(Sys.Date(),'_%Y_%m_%d')

#Creating and defining the results path for rabbits

#Creating the 'results' folder for rabbits of date
results_Rabbits_folder<- file.path(lowres_folder,paste0("results/rabbit",date))

#If the file doesn't exist, creates one
if(!dir.exists(results_Rabbits_folder)){
  dir.create(results_Rabbits_folder,recursive=TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

# df_graphing<-read.csv(paste0(mypath, "/analysis_ready_data/df_lowres_scenarioA.csv")) %>%
#   mutate(TIME = case_when(
#     Timepoint == "Baseline" ~ -2,
#     Timepoint == "EOS" ~ -0.167,
#     Timepoint == "EOR" ~ -0,
#     Timepoint == "1HR" ~ 1,
#     Timepoint == "3HR" ~ 3,
#     Timepoint == "6HR" ~ 6,
#     Timepoint == "24HR" ~ 24,
#     T ~ NA)) %>%
#   mutate(TIME_VIS = case_when(
#     Timepoint == "Baseline" ~ -2,
#     Timepoint == "EOS" ~ -1,
#     Timepoint == "EOR" ~ -0.6,
#     Timepoint == "1HR" ~ 0.4,
#     Timepoint == "3HR" ~ 1.4,
#     Timepoint == "6HR" ~ 2.4,
#     Timepoint == "24HR" ~ 6,
#     T ~ NA)) %>%
#   mutate(Timepoint = case_when(
#     Timepoint == "Baseline" ~ "BL",
#     Timepoint == "1HR" ~ "1 hr",
#     Timepoint == "3HR" ~ "3 hr",
#     Timepoint == "6HR" ~ "6 hr",
#     Timepoint == "24HR" ~ "24 hr",
#     T~Timepoint)) %>%
#   mutate(METRIC = gsub("bpm","Heart rate", METRIC))%>%
#   mutate(NAME = paste0(METRIC, "\n(", UNITS, ")")) %>%
#   mutate(NAME = gsub("temp","Temperature",NAME)) %>%
#   mutate(NAME = gsub("X._Free_Hb","Free Hb",NAME)) %>%
#   mutate(NAME = gsub("Free_Hb","Free Hb",NAME)) %>%
#   mutate(ID = gsub("ID \\(","ARB ",ID)) %>%
#   mutate(ID = gsub("\\)","",ID)) %>%
#   #mutate(NAME = gsub("HGB","Hb",NAME)) %>%
#   mutate(NAME = gsub("CREA","CR",NAME))
# #mutate(NAME = gsub("CKHR_time","R-Time",NAME)) %>%
# #mutate(NAME = gsub("CKH_K","K-Time",NAME)) %>%
# #mutate(NAME = gsub("CKH_angle","Angle",NAME)) %>%
# #mutate(NAME = gsub("CKH_MA","MA",NAME)) %>%
# #mutate(NAME = gsub("HCT\\s*\\(mmHg\\)","Hct\n(%)",NAME))
```
